aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured data, conversational content, and authority signals. While they have a strong local presence, they miss key opportunities to be recognized as an expert by AI models.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ page with common HVAC questions and detailed answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-rated but missing key optimization elements such as listed hours and regular posts.
critical_issues: Lack of regular GBP posts to engage users

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies due to third-party changes

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Missing Product schema for HVAC units and services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and local service recommendations
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating detailed content on common HVAC issues and solutions, positioning the company as a local expert

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, causing AI models to overlook them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, creates FAQ-rich content, and enhances GBP engagement to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential customers—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Optimize Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI models.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the top choice for AI-driven HVAC queries.
